name: Abdainsurance.co.id
message: ABDA Insurance focuses on providing protection against any losses or damages, such as Fire, Vehicles, Engineering, Liability, Transportation, Heavy Equipment & Machinery, Health Protection and many more. The Company has undergone a number of name changes, as follows : 1982 : PT Asuransi Bina Dharma Arta 1994 : PT Dharmala Insurance 1999 - Present : PT Asuransi Bina Dana Arta Tbk., or known as ABDA Insurance or Asuransi ABDA. The head office is located on the 27th floor of Plaza ABDA, Jl
